text:
Hey There, I am Sofia Carter. HP printer, not printing problems can occur due to various reasons. However, it is not always a reason to worry. You should start with the basic HP Printers troubleshooting steps mentioned below to fix any temporary issue with your printer.
https://www.hpprintersupportpro.com/blog/hp-printer-troubleshooting/
